/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  --no-gnu-unique -Wreturn-type -O3 -DNDEBUG    -Wl,--disable-new-dtags   -shared -Wl,-soname,UniversalRobotPickupController.so -o ../../lib/choreonoid-2.2/simplecontroller/UniversalRobotPickupController.so CMakeFiles/UniversalRobotPickupController.dir/UniversalRobotPickupController.cpp.o   -L/home/mrp/catkin_ws/build/choreonoid/lib  -L/home/mrp/catkin_ws/build/choreonoid/lib/choreonoid-2.2  -L/usr/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu  -Wl,-rpath,/home/mrp/catkin_ws/build/choreonoid/lib:/home/mrp/catkin_ws/build/choreonoid/lib/choreonoid-2.2:/usr/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu: ../../lib/libCnoidBody.so.2.2 ../../lib/libCnoidAISTCollisionDetector.so.2.2 ../../lib/libCnoidUtil.so.2.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.a -lpthread -lm -ldl -lstdc++fs
